name: Guava Smoked
tagline: Texas-style BBQ smoked with Hawaiian guava wood — brisket and pulled pork that taste like nowhere else on earth.
mustOrder: pulled pork — guava wood gives it a subtle sweetness
talkStory: Founded by pitmaster Abe Natividad, who perfected the art of smoking meat with locally sourced Hawaiian guava wood — giving the brisket and pulled pork a subtly sweet, floral smoke flavor unlike anything from mesquite or hickory. Started doing pop-ups around Honolulu before landing the Kapahulu brick-and-mortar. The guava wood is harvested on-island, making this a genuinely Hawaii-born BBQ concept you cannot replicate on the mainland. Portions are generous for the price — the combo plate is the move.
